# terrible_community_general_pacemaker_stonith (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Specify the STONITH name to create.

### Optional

- `agent_validation` (Boolean) Enabled agent validation for STONITH creation.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state for cluster STONITH.
- `stonith_argument` (String) Action to associate with STONITH.
- `stonith_metas` (String) List of metadata to associate with STONITH.
- `stonith_operations` (String) List of operations to associate with STONITH.
- `stonith_options` (String) Specify the STONITH option to create.
- `stonith_type` (String) Specify the STONITH device type.
- `wait` (Number) Timeout period for polling the STONITH creation.

### Read-Only

- `previous_value` (String) The value of the STONITH before executing the module.
- `value` (String) The value of the STONITH after executing the module.
